title: ANGIX Set of 2 Plastic Mixing Bowls 20cm (2000ml) Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, Transparent Nesting Bowl Set for Baking, Prep, Mixing & Serving Salad, Fruit & Vegetables
features: 𝗠𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶-𝗨𝘀𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝘅𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗕𝗼𝘄𝗹𝘀 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗲𝘁 :- This mixing bowls plastic set includes 15cm, 20cm & 30cm sizes - available in packs of 1 and 2. Perfect for baking, prepping, and serving. These plastic mixing bowls are designed for daily use in every UK kitchen.

𝗛𝗲𝗮𝘃𝘆-𝗗𝘂𝘁𝘆 & 𝗟𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁𝘄𝗲𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁 :- Crafted from BPA-free, food-safe plastic, these mixing bowls are strong and crack-resistant. These lightweight plastic mixing bowls offer effortless mixing and durability for festivals or everyday prep.

𝗡𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗠𝗶𝘅𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗕𝗼𝘄𝗹𝘀 𝗦𝗮𝘃𝗲 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗲 & 𝗦𝘁𝗮𝘆 𝗖𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗻 :- These mixing bowls set stack neatly to save space. With smooth surfaces and dishwasher-safe material, the mixing bowls plastic set is easy to clean after baking, prepping, or serving.

𝗦𝘁𝗮𝗯𝗹𝗲 𝗡𝗼𝗻-𝗦𝗹𝗶𝗽 𝗕𝗮𝘀𝗲 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗘𝗳𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗹𝗲𝘀𝘀 𝗠𝗶𝘅𝗶𝗻𝗴 :- Mixing bowls plastic large or small sizes all feature a non-slip base for stability. Whether stirring, blending, or whisking, these plastic mixing bowls stay in place for safe, spill-free mixing.

𝗖𝗹𝗲𝗮𝗿 𝗠𝗶𝘅𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗕𝗼𝘄𝗹𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗤𝘂𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗩𝗶𝗲𝘄 & 𝗠𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶-𝗧𝗮𝘀𝗸𝗶𝗻𝗴 :- Transparent plastic mixing bowls allow you to easily monitor your contents. This plastix mixing bowl set is perfect for baking, mixing sauces, tossing salads, or serving party snacks during UK events.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Durable, Freezer Safe, Lightweight, Reusable, Non-Toxic, Outdoor Safe, Lead Free, Stackable
